narration: This is Hamilton's rule, a fascinating concept in biology!

narration: It suggests that an organism will behave altruistically if the benefit to relatives, weighted by the degree of genetic relatedness, exceeds the cost to itself.
visual_description: Escalation visual: It suggests that an organism will behave altruistically if the benefit to relatives, weighted by the degree of genetic r
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: It suggests that an organism will behave altruistically if the benefit to relatives, weighted by the degree of genetic r

narration: For example, bees sacrifice themselves to protect their hive. Why? Because they're closely related!
